zh.lifeSummary: 當Gregory de Melville於大約1139年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，他的父親Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh31歲，母親Matilda Malherbe21歲。他和Matilda Motherbe至少有1個兒子。他去世於1178年在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安拉斯瓦德享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gregory de Melville于大约1139年出生在英国苏格兰时，他的父亲Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh31岁，母亲Matilda Malherbe21岁。他和Matilda Motherbe至少有1个儿子。他去世于1178年在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安拉斯瓦德享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Melville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the various places in Normandy called Malleville, from Latin mala ‘bad’ + ville ‘settlement’.
Irish (mainly Ulster): English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Maoilmhichíl ‘descendant of Maoilmhichil’, a personal name meaning ‘devotee of (Saint) Michael’.

History: The American novelist Herman Melville (1819–91) was a descendantof the Scottish Melvilles. His maternal grandfather was the revolutionary war general Peter Gansevoort (born 1749 in Albany, NY). His paternal grandfather was Maj. Thomas Melville of Boston. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Maol Mhichíl, a chief of Síol Muireadhaigh (County Roscommon) in the 9th century.

variants.name: Melvin
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of Melville with alternation of final -l and -n.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoil Mhín ‘descendant of the devotee of Maoilmhín’, a personal name meaning ‘gentle chieftain’.

variants.name: Mellin
meanings: German: habitational name from any of various places so called.

variants.name: Mulvihill
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoil Mhichíl ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Michael’. The Anglicized form was sometimes abbreviated into Melville .

nameMeanings.name: Gregory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Latin Gregorius from the post-classical Greek name Gregōrios ‘watchful’ (a derivative of gregōrein ‘to watch, be vigilant’). The name was a very popular one among the early Christians, who were mindful of the injunction ‘be sober, be vigilant’ (1 Peter 5:8). It was borne by a number of early saints. The most important, in honour of whom the name was often bestowed from medieval times onwards, were Gregory of Nazianzen ( c.329–90 ), Gregory of Nyssa ( d. c.395 ), Gregory of Tours ( 538–94 ), and Pope Gregory the Great ( c.540–604 ). A famous bearer of the name in modern times is the film star Gregory Peck ( 1916–2003 ). The name has traditionally been popular in Scotland, where it is often found in the form Gregor .

en.lifeSummary: When Gregory de Melville was born about 1139, in Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh, was 31 and his mother, Matilda Malherbe, was 21. He had at least 1 son with Matilda Motherbe. He died in 1178, in Lasswade, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gregory de Melville est né environ 1139, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Matilda Malherbe, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Matilda Motherbe. Il est décédé en 1178, à Lasswade, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gregory de Melville um 1139 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh 31 und seine Mutter Matilda Malherbe 21. Er hatte mit Matilda Motherbe mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1178 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Lasswade, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gregory de Melville è nato il circa 1139 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Malherbe, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Matilda Motherbe. Morì nel 1178, nel Lasswade, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gregory de Melvilleが約1139年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburghは31歳，母Matilda Malherbeは21歳であった。彼はMatilda Motherbeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1178年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンラスワドで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gregory de Melville(이)가 대략 1139년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Malherbe(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Matilda Motherbe(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1178년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 래스웨이드에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gregory de Melville nasceu aproximadamente 1139, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Malherbe, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Matilda Motherbe. Ele faleceu em 1178, em Lasswade, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gregory de Melville родился около 1139 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda Malherbe, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Matilda Motherbe. Он умер в 1178 г. в местности лассвад, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gregory de Melville nació aproximadamente 1139, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Matilda Malherbe, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Matilda Motherbe. Murió en 1178, en Lasswade, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
